# `import` - database schema slice

Source of truth: [`backend/prisma/schema.prisma`](../../../prisma/schema.prisma).
This file mirrors the Prisma models owned by this feature so the schema is
co-located with the code that reads/writes it. Regenerate via:

```bash
pwsh backend/scripts/scaffold-feature-schemas.ps1
```

## `ImportLog`

```prisma
model ImportLog {
  id                String   @id @default(uuid())
  userId            String
  fileName          String
  fileType          String
  sourceKind        String
  totalRecords      Int
  importedRecords   Int
  skippedRecords    Int
  duplicateRecords  Int
  createdCategories Json     @default("[]")
  createdAccounts   Json     @default("[]")
  createdGoals      Json     @default("[]")
  updatedGoals      Json     @default("[]")
  failedRecords     Int      @default(0)
  errors            Json     @default("[]")
  metadata          String?
  createdAt         DateTime @default(now())
  user              User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([createdAt])
  @@index([sourceKind])
  @@index([userId])
  @@schema("public")
}
```
